parameters.query: SELECT t.telegram_id AS chat_id, p.height_cm, p.weight_kg, p.age, p.sex, p.activity_level, p.goal, p.daily_baseline_kcal, p.bmr, p.training_days_interval, p.target_kcal, p.target_protein_g, p.target_fat_g, p.target_carbs_g FROM fitness_profile p JOIN fitness_tguser t ON t.id = p.user_id
SELECT id, to_char(date,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS date, time, description, kcal, protein, fat, carbs, meal_type FROM fitness_foodlog ORDER BY date, time, id
SELECT to_char(date,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS date, day_plan, exercises_done, duration_min, kcal_burned, notes FROM fitness_workoutlog ORDER BY date
SELECT to_char(date,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS date, weight, body_fat_pct, notes FROM fitness_bodyparams ORDER BY date
SELECT to_char(date,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS date, time, activity, duration_min, distance_km, speed_kmh, kcal_burned, notes FROM fitness_walkinglog ORDER BY date, time, id
